---
title: "External resources"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

## Useful links

If you are the parent or carer of a person with complex communication needs, you may find some of these links useful.

Further down you will find summaries of relevant research studies that we have put together.

### Education

https://www.ipsea.org.uk/

https://sossen.org.uk/

### Policy

https://councilfordisabledchildren.org.uk/

### Support

https://contact.org.uk/

https://carers.org/

https://www.sibs.org.uk/

https://www.kids.org.uk/

### Financial support

https://www.theboparancharitabletrust.com/

https://www.familyfund.org.uk/

### Therapy

https://www.rcslt.org/

https://speechandlanguage.org.uk/

https://www.rcot.co.uk/

### Research charities

https://rarechromo.org/

https://www.autistica.org.uk/

https://embracingcomplexity.org.uk/


## Research highlights

Watch this space...
